---
title: LLM Content Project Management App
description: A specialized project management application designed specifically for managing, organizing, and collaborating on LLM (Large Language Model) content.
version: 0.1.0
framework: Next.js 16 (App Router)
---

# LLM Content Project Management App

## Description
A specialized project management application built to manage workspaces, tasks, and team collaborations specifically for **LLM (Large Language Model) content**. It includes features tailored for AI content workflows, such as task automation, drag-and-drop task organization, dashboards with charts, and real-time updates.

## Tech Stack
- **Framework**: Next.js 16.2.9 (App Router)
- **Library**: React 19.2.4
- **Database / Backend**: Firebase 12.15.0 (Firestore, Authentication, Hosting, etc.)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS v4, Lucide React (Icons), `next-themes` (Dark Mode)
- **UI Components**: Shadcn UI, Radix UI, Base UI
- **Data Visualization**: Chart.js (`react-chartjs-2`), Recharts
- **Drag & Drop**: `@hello-pangea/dnd`

## LLM Content Specific Features

### 1. Content Types & Formats
- **Multiple Content Formats**: Support for various LLM-generated content types including:Blog Posts (Long-form)
- **Social Media Posts** (Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook)
- **Email Campaigns**
- **Ad Copy** (Google Ads, Facebook Ads)
- **Product Descriptions**
- **Landing Pages**
- **Technical Documentation**
- **News Articles**

### 2. Content Workflows & Automation
- **Content Generation Pipeline**: Streamlined workflow for creating LLM content from ideation to publication.
- **AI Assistant Integration**: Seamless integration with AI assistants for content generation and editing.
- **Template Library**: Pre-defined templates for different content formats to ensure consistency.
- **Custom Workflows**: Ability to create custom content workflows tailored to specific team needs.
- **Version Control**: Track different versions of content as it goes through the review and approval process.

### 3. Content Organization & Management
- **Content Categorization**: Organize content by category, topic, or industry for easy access.
- **Content Tagging**: Tag content with relevant keywords to improve searchability and organization.
- **Content Folders**: Create folders to group related content and manage projects efficiently.
- **Content Status Tracking**: Track the status of each content piece (e.g., Draft, In Review, Approved, Published).
- **Content Calendar**: Visual calendar to plan and schedule content publication dates.
- **Audience Targeting**: Specify target audience for each content piece to ensure alignment with marketing goals.

### 4. Content Quality Assurance
- **Plagiarism Detection**: Built-in tools to detect plagiarism and ensure originality.
- **Grammar & Spell Check**: AI-powered grammar and spell checking to improve content quality.
- **Readability Score**: Track readability score to ensure content is appropriate for the target audience.
- **Tone & Style Analysis**: Analyze content tone and style to ensure it aligns with brand voice.
- **Keyword Density Check**: Monitor keyword density to optimize for search engines.

### 5. Collaboration & Approval Workflows
- **Team Collaboration**: Enable team members to collaborate on content creation and editing.
- **Review & Approval System**: Streamlined review and approval workflows with notifications and tracking.
- **Comment Threads**: Threaded discussions for feedback and suggestions on specific content sections.
- **Content Ratings**: Rate content quality and performance to identify top-performing pieces.

### 6. SEO Optimization Features
- **Keyword Research Integration**: Integrate with keyword research tools to identify relevant keywords.
- **SEO Score**: Real-time SEO score for each content piece based on keyword usage and other SEO factors.
- **Meta Tag Optimization**: Tools to optimize meta titles and descriptions for search engines.
- **Internal Linking Suggestions**: AI-powered suggestions for internal linking to improve site structure.
- **External Linking Recommendations**: Suggestions for relevant external links to enhance content value.

### 7. Performance Analytics
- **Content Performance Tracking**: Track content performance metrics including page views, engagement, and conversions.
- **Audience Insights**: Understand audience preferences and behavior to tailor content strategy.
- **Content ROI Tracking**: Measure the return on investment for content marketing efforts.
- **A/B Testing**: Tools for A/B testing different content variations to optimize performance.
- **Export Analytics**: Export content performance data for further analysis and reporting.

### 8. Content Management System (CMS)
- **Centralized Content Repository**: All content stored in a centralized location for easy access and management.
- **Multi-Platform Support**: Manage content for multiple platforms (website, social media, email) from a single interface.
- **Content Archiving**: Archive old or outdated content to maintain a clean and organized content library.
- **Content Migration Tools**: Tools to facilitate migration of content between different platforms.
- **Custom Content Types**: Create custom content types beyond the standard formats to meet specific needs.

### 9. User Roles & Permissions
- **Role-Based Access Control**: Define different roles (e.g., Content Writer, Editor, Publisher, Administrator) with specific permissions.
- **Content Permissions**: Control who can create, edit, approve, and publish content.
- **Workspace Permissions**: Manage permissions at the workspace level for team-specific access.
- **Content Ownership**: Assign ownership of content pieces to specific team members.
- **Permission Auditing**: Track permission changes and maintain an audit trail for security and compliance.

### 10. Integration Capabilities
- **Social Media Integration**: Connect with social media platforms to schedule and publish content directly.
- **Email Marketing Tools**: Integrate with email marketing tools for campaign management.
- **SEO Tools**: Connect with SEO tools for keyword research and optimization.
- **Analytics Platforms**: Integrate with analytics platforms to track content performance.
- **Content Delivery Networks (CDNs)**: Integration with CDNs for faster content delivery.
- **AI Content Generation Tools**: Seamless integration with various AI content generation tools and platforms.

## Structure
- `/src/app` - Next.js App Router pages and layouts.
- `/src/lib` - Firebase configurations, helper functions, and data models (e.g., `automation.ts`, `task.ts`, `firebase.ts`).
- `/src/components` - Reusable UI components.

## Guidelines
- This project uses standard Next.js App Router conventions.
- Firebase handles backend functionality (Auth and Firestore).
- Styles are handled through standard Tailwind v4 utility classes.
